user_intent_preservation.original_goal: Migrate the TC387 TOM-based 3-phase inverter PWM to TC4D7 eGTM ATOM on KIT_A3G_TC4D7_LITE using the unified PWM driver, keeping 20 kHz center-aligned complementary PWM with 1 µs dead-time, HS active-high and LS active-low, push-pull outputs, AGC synchronized start, CMU FXCLK0 for ATOM and CMU CLK0 for DTM, and a period ISR on CPU0 priority 20.
user_intent_preservation.functional_behavior: Generate 3-phase center-aligned complementary PWM at 20 kHz with 1 µs hardware dead-time using ATOM+CDTM, start all channels synchronously via AGC, route outputs to P20.8..P20.13 in push-pull with HS active-high and LS active-low, run a period interrupt on CPU0 with priority 20.
user_intent_preservation.technical_approach: Use unified high-level IfxEgtm_Pwm to configure ATOM0 channels (0..5) as base+sync channels with center-aligned mode and complementary outputs via CDTM with 1 µs dead-time. Enable FXCLK0 for ATOM and CLK0 for DTM via IfxEgtm_Cmu and IfxEgtm_Dtm. Map the six outputs to P20.8..P20.13 using IfxEgtm_PinMap_setAtomTout. Start channels synchronously using IfxEgtm_Pwm_startSyncedChannels. Install a period ISR on CPU0 (prio 20) and call IfxEgtm_Pwm_interruptHandler from the ISR.
user_intent_preservation.pin_channel_mapping_next_step: Resolution of the exact ATOM instance, channel-to-TOUT mapping for P20.8..P20.13, and CDTM indices is a required next step and must be finalized and documented before implementation.

driver_selection.selection_rationale: Unified high-level driver available in the template, matches TC4xx eGTM, supports synchronized multi-channel PWM, complementary pairs, dead-time control, and center-aligned mode required for a 3-phase inverter.

runtime_function.name: updateEgtmAtom3phInvDuty
runtime_function.purpose: Update the 3-phase PWM duties immediately while preserving center-alignment and the configured dead-time.

migration_notes.context_preserved: The migration keeps the 3-phase center-aligned complementary PWM with 1 µs dead-time, uses eGTM ATOM+CDTM, starts synchronously via AGC, selects FXCLK0 (ATOM) and CLK0 (DTM), maps outputs to P20.8..P20.13, and installs a CPU0 period ISR at priority 20, all achieved through the unified IfxEgtm_Pwm APIs and eGTM support drivers.

PWM.rationale: âœ… Available in template | âœ… Matches target family (TC4xx) | Complexity: advanced | Best for: 3-phase inverter, motor control, multi-channel synchronized PWM | Features: multi_channel_sync, complementary_pairs, dead_time, center_aligned, edge_aligned

objectives: Verify 20 kHz center-aligned complementary PWM with 1 µs dead-time matches requirements after migration
Validate synchronized start across all six outputs and correct HS/LS polarities
Confirm ISR behavior on CPU0 priority 20 and absence of timing regressions

approach.unit_tests: Provide stubs/mocks for IfxEgtm_Pwm APIs to validate configuration structs, duty/dead-time updates, and error handling without hardware.
approach.hardware_in_the_loop: Run on KIT_A3G_TC4D7_LITE with AGC sync start; capture PWM on P20.8..P20.13 using scope/LA; exercise duty and frequency changes at runtime.
approach.signal_monitoring: Measure period (20 kHz), duty symmetry, center alignment, complementary polarity, and 1 µs hardware dead-time; log ISR timestamps to assess jitter/latency.

acceptance_criteria: Measured PWM frequency at 20 kHz and center-aligned waveforms on all phases
Complementary outputs exhibit 1 µs dead-time and correct HS/LS polarity
All six channels start synchronously under AGC
ISR on CPU0 (prio 20) triggers on each period event with bounded latency/jitter

architecture_overview.summary: High-level view of eGTM-based PWM: application configures IfxEgtm_Pwm (ATOM+CDTM), CMU clocks ATOM via FXCLK0 and DTM via CLK0, AGC synchronizes channel start, and a period ISR on CPU0 handles updates.
modules: IfxEgtm_Pwm (ATOM channels 0..5 with CDTM for complementary/ dead-time)
data_flow: Initialization: IfxEgtm_Pwm_initConfig -> IfxEgtm_Pwm_init (+ CMU/DTM clock setup, pin routing)
Runtime Updates: Application -> IfxEgtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDutyImmediate (and dead-time updates as needed)
interrupt_sequence: CPU0 ISR executes and calls IfxEgtm_Pwm_interruptHandler
Application may adjust duties or scheduling for next period
architecture_overview.synchronization: AGC ensures all six ATOM outputs start and update coherently.
